strengths: Clear and concise skills section listing relevant technologies (Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, React)
Professional summary effectively communicates enthusiasm and current educational focus
Contact information is well-presented and easy to locate
weaknesses: No work experience, internships, or placements listed, making it difficult to assess practical ability
No projects section to demonstrate hands-on application of listed skills
Education section is thin with only one qualification and no grades, modules, or achievements mentioned
missing: Projects section with links (GitHub, live demos)
Certifications or online courses (e.g., freeCodeCamp, Coursera)
summary: This CV is at an early-career stage and currently lacks the depth needed to stand out for a Software Engineer role, with no projects or experience to back up the listed skills. Adding a strong projects section and any relevant work experience or placements would significantly improve its competitiveness.
